ogTitle: Uriarra Village vs Waramanga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Uriarra Village and Waramanga.
heading: Uriarra Village vs Waramanga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Uriarra Village, Australian Capital Territory and Waramanga, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Uriarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Waramanga (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Uriarra Village or Waramanga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Uriarra Village has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Waramanga scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Uriarra Village scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Waramanga scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Uriarra Village or Waramanga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Uriarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
